title: TurboQuant Explained..
summary: TurboQuant is a Google quantization technique that compresses KV cache and vectors to reduce VRAM requirements and GPU memory demands. The method uses codebook-based vector quantization and mean squared error optimization to maintain model performance while reducing memory footprint.
